rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Reasonable Attorneys' Fees On Appeal (Ccp 1021.5, Crc 3.1702)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 1, 2010, line 10, PLAINTIFF CORAL CONSTRUCTION INC., SCHRAM CONSTRUCTION, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP. Motion For Award Of Reasonable Attorneys' Fees On Appeal (Ccp 1021.5, Crc 3.1702). DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THIS CASE STILL AWAITS REMAND AND A DETERMINATION AS TO THE VALIDITY OF THE ORDINANCE. THE TRIAL COURT'S SUMMARY JUDGMENT RULING IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR WAS REVERSED, AND A REMITTITUR ORDERED THAT DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO RECOVER COSTS AS THE PREVAILING PARTY ON APPEAL. SEE URBANIAK V. NEWTON (1993) 19 CAL.APP.4TH 1837, 1841-42. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WU'S CONSTRUCTION INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. 2270 MISSION STREET,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 1, 2010, line 2, DEFENDANT STANLEY LEONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. GRANTED. DEFENDANT DEMONSTRATES EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AND THE LAW FAVORS ADJUDICATION ON THE MERITS. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $1,000 TO PLAINTIFF. CCP SECTION 473(c)(1)(A). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MERCEDES NICOLE GALLAGHER VS. KATHERINE AUGUST et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn By Subpoenaed Non-Party Wilshire Surgicenter For An Order Quashing Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance And Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 1, 2010, line 2, OTHER WILSHIRE SURGICENTER (SUBPOENAED NON-PARTY) Motion By Subpoenaed Non-Party Wilshire Surgicenter For An Order Quashing Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance And Production Of Business Records. CONTINUE TO DECEMBER 23, 2010. MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. SEE SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: GIANCARLO MARANGHI VS. BENNY CHETCUTI JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend The First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 1, 2010, line 3, PLAINTIFF GIANCARLO MARANGHI'S Motion To Amend The First Amended Complaint. OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE (1) PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY AND PROOF OF SERVICE PER SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B (2) DEFENDANT FILED FOR BANKRUPTCY ON JUNE 17 AND THERE IS NO ORDER INDICATING THAT THE AUTOMATIC STAY HAS BEEN LIFTED, AND (3) THE JUNE 11 ENTRY ON THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS INDICATES THAT THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO A STAY. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: YEONG JOO KIM VS. DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 1, 2010, line 4, DEFENDANT MTC FINANCIAL INC., DBA TRUSTEE CORPS MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. GRANTED WITH ONE, FINAL, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, AS TO ATTORNEY FEES. PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE LEGAL OR STATUTORY BASIS FOR ATTORNEY FEES AS TO DEFENDANT TRUSTEE CORPS. GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGATION THAT IS NOT ADDRESSED IN PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: YEONG JOO KIM VS. DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 1, 2010, line 4, DEFENDANT MTC FINANCIAL INC., DBA TRUSTEE CORPS DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITH ONE, FINAL, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND, 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WITH PARTICULARITY AS TO TRUSTEE CORPS. (THE DECLARATION ATTACHED TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT CLEARLY STATES IT WAS MADE UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY.) PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE ACTIONABLE CONDUCT BY TRUSTEE AND A STATUTORY OR FRAUDULENT BASIS TO SUPPORT A VIOLATION OF B&P CODE SECTION 17200. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE ACTIONABLE FRAUD COMMITTED BY TRUSTEE TO SUPPORT THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CC SECTION 1572. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD A SPECIFIC MATERIAL MISREPRESENTATION AS TO TRUSTEE DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE OF FALSITY, INTENT TO DEFRAUD, RELIANCE AND DAMAGE. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA VS. AUGUSTA R CARBALLO et al

rulings.Case Title: NORBERTO GAERLAN VS. NEW AMERICA MEDIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 1, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANTS ALEXANDRA CLOSE, PACIFICA NEWS SERVICE, DBA NEW AMERICA MEDIA Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TORRANO VS. CATHERINE KOSTLAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Joseph Torrano'S Hearing On Order To Show Cause (Re Why Receiver Should Not Be Appointed)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 1, 2010, line 7, Plaintiff Joseph Torrano's Hearing On Order To Show Cause (Re Why Receiver Should Not Be Appointed). HEARING CONTINUED TO JANUARY 14, 2011. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE TO PLAINTIFF AN ACCOUNTING OF THE RENTS AND PROFITS THAT ARE IN THE SEGREGATED ACCOUNT BY DECEMBER 17, 2010. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING INSPECTION DATE FOR THE PROPERTY AND INSPECTION TO OCCUR BY DECEMBER 30, 2010. DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE TO PLAINTIFF COPIES OF STATEMENTS AND/OR CANCELLED CHECKS MADE TO THE SENIOR LENDER BY DECEMBER 17, 2010. DEFENDANT TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF REGARDING THESE ISSUES BY JANUARY 5, 2011 AND PLAINTIFF TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY BY JANUARY 12, 2011. BRIEFS ARE TO BE NO MORE THAN 5 PAGES AND ALL PARTIES TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES WITH DEPARTMENT 302. =(302/CWW)
